title: ITALY enforcement action against ITAS Mutua (50,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 50,000 on ITAS Mutua. A former employee of the controller requested access to the documents and emails on his personalised company email account. However, the controller only provided emails that were not declared as work-related, confidential or per...
